blast_radius: zero production-code blast radius: additive test-only file, no imports change, no shared fixtures/conftest.py introduced that could affect other test files in agents/query/ or elsewhere

runtime: agents/llm/client.py::LLMError (not directly needed, no error-path tests planned here -- already covered in 4.3.1's file)

risk_notes: Risk of accidental duplication with test_intent_refiner.py's two existing fixtures -- mitigated by using distinct query strings/domains per architecture-discovery.md.

Risk of over-specifying LLM behavior (i.e. testing the mock rather than refine_intent) -- mitigated by asserting on IntentRefinerResult.query_type returned by refine_intent(), not on the fake client's return value directly.
No risk to intent_refiner.py since it is not modified.
